clusters.justification: These terms co-activate across socio-emotional and autonomic regulatory pathways to broadly process emotional valence, physiological arousal, and subjective feeling states.
This cluster maps onto mesocorticolimbic circuitry dedicated to calculating expected utility, reinforcement learning, and guiding goal-directed incentive behavior.
These terms reflect core default-mode functional operations involved in internally constructed representations, uniting self-referential processing with interpersonal and mental state inferences.
